Strong underlying business: gross margin 75.5%, debt/equity 0.158, FY24 revenue $34.86B / EPS $4.20
News flow heavily bullish ('Loaded Up', '3 Reasons to Buy Like No Tomorrow') — contrarian concern at this level
3-month return still -14.9% despite the bounce, indicating the correction is not fully digested
